key_facts: solarman.cn is the domestic Chinese-language portal version of IGEN Tech / SOLARMAN
SOLARMAN Smart app: for end-users (homeowners) to monitor their systems
SOLARMAN Business: for professional installers and operations teams
Chinese domestic registration: accepts phone-number registration (not email)
OEM white-label offered to 20+ countries from the China platform
Installer portal enables channel sales of monitoring hardware + software subscriptions
Serves China's 10,000+ small EPC firms with digitalization tools
Domestic vs international: solarman.cn (China) vs solarmanpv.com (global)
business_model_notes: Domestic Chinese version of the SOLARMAN monitoring platform serves dual function: (1) O&M monitoring for installed solar owners; (2) marketplace connecting solar installers with hardware suppliers (data loggers, sensors) and end-consumers. The installer portal provides business management tools for small EPC firms — design tools, proposal generation, customer management — functioning as a 'solar installer CRM' as much as a monitoring platform. This marketplace/CRM function is distinct from the international SOLARMAN PV monitoring positioning.
competitive_position: Domestic China platform competes for installer loyalty against Zheguyun Solar SaaS (full workflow platform for installers) and general B2B tools. SOLARMAN's advantage: existing installed base of data loggers creates switch-in costs; monitoring hardware sales create recurring hardware revenue separate from SaaS.
research_notes: Medium confidence. solarman.cn functionality confirmed from direct website inspection. OEM white-label program and domestic-specific features (phone registration) from platform documentation. This entry is listed separately from solarman-igen-tech (the parent global brand) to capture the domestic installer marketplace function which differs from the global monitoring SaaS narrative.
